prediction_sources.evidence_statement: Raw amino-acid sequence for the RCSB polymer entity.

Entry keywords: VIRAL PROTEIN Hemagglutinin, Influenza A virus, H3N2, Viral Entry, Trimer, Glycoprotein, Membrane Fusion, VIRAL PROTEIN. Polymer composition: homomeric protein.
